resolved.resolution: Section 二 split mismatch was a symptom of the parenthesized numbering in (6),(7),(8),(9),(10) being incorrectly parsed. Corrected by extracting solution blocks directly by their (6)-(10) markers, following the solution file's own sequential numbering.
Option A text was inline in the stem as $\left(\mathrm{A}\right)\mathrm{d}z\bigg|_{(0,0)} = 3\mathrm{d}x + \mathrm{d}y.$ extracted manually.
Solutions (7)-(10) exist in the source file. Earlier parser failed to split section 二 solutions. Corrected by extracting each (N)【答案】and (N)【解】 block individually.

newlyFound.message: Previous run assigned eigenvalue method commentary (from solution (18) '方法点评' sub-items (1)(2)(3)) to questions 1-3 instead of their actual differential equation/calculus/algebra solutions. Root cause: parenthesized sub-numbering in method点评 was confused with question numbering.
Previous run concatenated all of section 二 solutions (6)-(10) into q06's explanation instead of splitting per question.

mdFinalizationResolved.message: Questions 11-20 had no explicit 【答案】 markers in source solution file. Answers were embedded in explanation text. In md-finalization, answers were extracted from the solution explanation text where uniquely identifiable.

q02 explanation had OCR spacing artifacts: \operatorname {d i v} rendered as 'd i v' instead of 'div', \mathbf {g r a d} r rendered as 'g r a d r' instead of 'grad r'. Normalized to \operatorname{div} and \mathbf{grad}.
q16 explanation had OCR digit spacing: \frac {1 3 \pi h ^ {2} (t)}{1 2} rendered as '1 3' and '1 2' instead of '13' and '12'. Normalized.

remainingWarnings.message: Question 6 options are images only. Option values are image markdown references. Human must visually verify the f(x) graph and 4 f'(x) candidate graphs.

Source solution file line 254 uses \begin{array}{r} without determinant bars (OCR artifact). Staging corrected to \begin{vmatrix}. The mathematical context (determinant of a cyclic matrix) supports the correction, but human should verify against PDF.
Question 7 options are inline LaTeX in the stem rather than separate list items. Option labels extracted from stem text.

Questions 15, 18, 19 have sub-parts (1)(2) in their stem. These are kept as single questions per the solution's sequential numbering (15, 18, 19). Human reviewer should verify this granularity choice.
